summary: Digital Dadi feature testing complete. Fixed 2 bugs: 1) Backend /api/dadi/upcoming and /api/dadi/add-missing-to-shopping endpoints were not fetching user from DB to get active_household, 2) Frontend DigitalDadi.js and AdminFestivalManager.js were using wrong localStorage key ('token' instead of 'auth_token'). All 19 backend tests pass. Frontend UI working correctly.
passed_tests: API /api/dadi/festivals - List all festivals (7 festivals returned)
API /api/dadi/festivals - Festivals have required fields (id, name, date, significance, key_ingredients)
API /api/dadi/tip-of-day - Returns random cooking tip
API /api/dadi/festivals?region=Maharashtra - Filter by region works
API /api/dadi/upcoming - Requires authentication (401 without token)
API /api/dadi/upcoming - Returns upcoming festivals with auth (Mahashivratri in 3 days)
API /api/dadi/add-missing-to-shopping - Requires authentication
API /api/dadi/add-missing-to-shopping - Returns 404 for invalid festival ID
API /api/dadi/add-missing-to-shopping - Works with valid festival ID
API POST /api/dadi/festivals - Create festival works
API PUT /api/dadi/festivals/{id} - Update festival works
API DELETE /api/dadi/festivals/{id} - Delete festival works
API DELETE /api/dadi/festivals/{id} - Returns 404 for non-existent festival
API /api/dadi/festivals/upload - Requires authentication
API /api/dadi/festivals/upload - Rejects non-CSV files
API /api/dadi/festivals/upload - Processes valid CSV file
Festival data integrity - Makar Sankranti exists with correct data
Festival data integrity - Mahashivratri is marked as fasting day
Festival data integrity - Ganesh Chaturthi exists with modak ingredients
Frontend - Homepage loads with Digital Dadi section
Frontend - Tip of Day displays correctly
Frontend - Upcoming Festivals shows Mahashivratri (3 days - Urgent!)
Frontend - Fasting Day badge displayed
Frontend - Readiness score (0%) and Add Missing button shown
Frontend - Admin Festival Manager page loads at /admin/festivals
Frontend - 7 festival cards displayed with edit/delete buttons
Frontend - Download Sample CSV button works
Frontend - Edit Festival dialog opens with form fields
seed_data_creation: 7 festivals already uploaded: Makar Sankranti, Mahashivratri, Holi, Gudi Padwa, Ashadhi Ekadashi, Nag Panchami, Ganesh Chaturthi
context_for_next_testing_agent: Digital Dadi feature fully tested and working. Fixed localStorage key issue (use 'auth_token' not 'token'). Fixed backend to fetch user from DB for active_household. Test user has active household with 9 inventory items. Mahashivratri is 3 days away (Feb 15) and shows as upcoming festival.

bugs_fixed.issue: get_upcoming_festivals and add_missing_to_shopping endpoints were using decode_token() which only returns JWT payload without active_household
bugs_fixed.fix: Added database lookup to fetch user document and get active_household from there

bugs_fixed.issue: Using localStorage.getItem('token') but auth system stores token as 'auth_token'
Same localStorage key issue - using 'token' instead of 'auth_token'
